fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the loaner.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of the loaner.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit price of the loaner.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the loaner card was last modified.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a comment for this loaner.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Contains the code for the number series that the program uses to assign the number of the loaner.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service document for the service item that was lent.

fields.name: Lent
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the loaner has been lent to a customer.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number for the loaner for the service item.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the loaner entry.
